name: Website Development Agreement
description: A contract between a client and a web developer detailing the scope, deliverables, payment terms, and intellectual property rights for a website project.
content:
WEBSITE DEVELOPMENT AGREEMENT

This Website Development Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {{formatDate agreement_date}} by and between the Client and the Developer named below.

1. THE PARTIES

A. Client:
Name/Company: {{client_name}}
Address: {{client_address}}
Contact Person: {{client_contact}}
Email: {{client_email}}

B. Developer:
Name/Company: {{developer_name}}
Address: {{developer_address}}
{{#if developer_tax_id}}Tax ID / Reg No: {{developer_tax_id}}
{{/if}} Email: {{developer_email}}

2. SCOPE OF PROJECT

The Developer agrees to design and develop a website (the "Website") for the Client according to the following specifications:

  • Purpose of Website: {{website_purpose}}
  • Key Pages / Sections: {{website_pages}}
  • Core Functionalities: {{website_functionalities}}
  • Design Approach: {{design_approach}}

Detailed requirements and specifications:

{{detailed_requirements}}

3. DELIVERY AND ACCEPTANCE

Estimated date for delivery of the Website for Client review/testing (UAT): {{formatDate delivery_date}}

Upon delivery, the Client will have {{testing_days}} days to test the Website and provide feedback or approval. The Developer will complete reasonable and in-scope revisions within {{revision_days}} days. Following final acceptance, the Developer will deploy the Website to the Client's hosting environment.

4. COMPENSATION AND PAYMENT SCHEDULE

The total project fee is {{total_fee}} (excluding applicable taxes).

Payment Schedule:

{{payment_schedule}}

5. CLIENT RESPONSIBILITIES

The Client agrees to provide all necessary content (text, images, branding guidelines) to the Developer no later than {{formatDate content_delivery_date}}. Delays in providing content may affect the project timeline.

The Client is solely responsible for acquiring and maintaining their domain name and web hosting services.

6. DEVELOPER RESPONSIBILITIES & MAINTENANCE

The Developer agrees to build the Website using modern web standards and ensure core functionalities perform as agreed.

{{#if (eq includes_maintenance 'Yes')}}

Post-Launch Support: The Developer will provide technical support and maintenance for a period of {{maintenance_months}} months following the final launch, covering the following scope: {{maintenance_scope}}.

{{else}}

This Agreement does not include post-launch maintenance. Any subsequent updates or support will require a separate agreement.

{{/if}}

7. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY

Upon full payment of the total project fee, the Client will own the intellectual property rights to the custom design and code created specifically for this project (Work Made for Hire). The Developer retains rights to any pre-existing frameworks, open-source libraries, or third-party plugins utilized, which are subject to their respective licenses.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Parties have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.

For the Client
{{client_contact}}

Signature: _________________________

Developer
{{developer_name}}

Signature: _________________________

fields.name: website_purpose
fields.label: Purpose of the Website
fields.placeholder: e.g., Corporate Portfolio, Blog, Basic E-Commerce

fields.name: website_pages
fields.label: Key Pages / Sections
fields.placeholder: e.g., Home, About Us, Services, Contact

fields.name: design_approach
fields.label: Design Approach
fields.placeholder: e.g., Custom UI/UX, Premium Theme Customization

fields.name: content_delivery_date
fields.label: Deadline for Client to provide content

fields.name: maintenance_scope
fields.label: Scope of Maintenance
fields.placeholder: e.g., Bug fixes, plugin updates, minor text edits.
